lessons.title: Basic Optical Aids: Mirrors, Magnifiers, and Light Sources
objectives: Select appropriate mirrors and magnifiers for common inspection tasks
Describe light sources and special lighting used in visual testing
Demonstrate proper care and verification of basic optical aids

lessons.title: Borescopes, Fiberscopes, and Remote Visual Inspection Systems
objectives: Differentiate rigid borescopes, fiberscopes, and video borescopes
Describe when remote visual inspection (RVI) systems are required
Identify basic handling precautions for scope equipment

lessons.title: Gauges, Measuring Tools, and Automated/Computer-Enhanced Systems
objectives: Identify common gauges, templates, scales, micrometers, and calipers used in VT
Explain the role of automated and computer-enhanced visual inspection systems
Select the correct measuring tool for a given dimensional check
cp105Topics: 4.8 Gauges (welding, go/no-go, etc.), templates, scales, micrometers, calipers, special tools
